goal: Ensure that all relevant groups are adequately represented in an entity, preventing systematic under-representation.
description: An entity composition includes groups in appropriate proportions for the task and context.

qualityDimension.source: Biessmann, F., Golebiowski, J., Rukat, T., Lange, D., Schmidt, P.: Automated data validation in machine learning systems. IEEE Data Eng. Bull. 44, 51–65 (2021)

statement: In the AMRStudy.isolates entity, the class imbalance of the gender attribute should not exceed 5%
